title: lygistum pubescens
intro: Lygistum pubescens, also known as dune fescue or hairy fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Lygistum pubescens include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Lygistum pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
